title: Effects of acupressure on sleep quality and anxiety of patients with second- or third-degree burns: a randomized sham-controlled trial
authors: Zahra Salajegheh, Mehdi Harorani, Mohadese Shahrodi, Elahe Dolati, M. Farahani, Nazanin Amini, Danial Habibi
abstract: Although acupressure is proposed to boost sleep quality and alleviate anxiety in various diseases, no study has examined the impact of acupressure on these symptoms in burn patients. This study aimed to investigate the effect of acupressure on sleep quality and anxiety in patients with second- or third-degree burns.

title: The effect of aromatherapy on sleep quality and anxiety in patients undergoing cardiac surgery: A systematic review and meta-analysis of randomized controlled trials
authors: Zahra Abbasijahromi, Farnaz Shahmansouri, Maryam Salehi, Maryam Nejad, Zahra Jahromi, Mahshid Namazi, Hojatollah Rajabi
abstract: This systematic review and meta-analysis aimed to evaluate the effect of aromatherapy on sleep quality and anxiety in patients undergoing cardiac surgery.
